summary: Issue #420: local safe-alembic-upgrade-local.sh with DB-identity confirmation, pg_dump backup, row-count gate, and shared resolve_db_identity helper. Production path unchanged. ADR-027 added. Reliability: non-interactive fail-fast, regression abort with restore hint. Security: no new secrets; backup dir gitignored. AC coverage mapped to unit/integration/doc contract tests.

interfaceChanges.description: Parses Supabase pooler/direct, localhost, and unknown hosts for local migration identity confirmation.
Local-dev alembic upgrade with backup, identity prompt, and row-count verification.

mappings.criterion: Running the new local wrapper against a real local Postgres backs up prints the resolved project ref runs alembic upgrade head verifies row counts and cleans up correctly
New integration test exercising the local wrapper end-to-end against throwaway Postgres including a forced regression case that must abort
Running with a piped non-interactive stdin does not hang and fails clearly with an actionable message instead of blocking on a prompt
New unit tests for the project-ref resolver covering Supabase pooler URL
New unit tests for the project-ref resolver covering Supabase direct URL
New unit tests for the project-ref resolver covering localhost identity
New unit tests for the project-ref resolver covering an unparseable unknown host
README.md and backend/README.md no longer show a bare alembic upgrade head in the local setup steps

recommendations: Manual TTY confirmation smoke on local Postgres remains HITL per issue test plan.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed; Guardrails found no CRITICAL reliability or security gaps. Local wrapper reuses production helpers without modifying deploy path.

ownerSignoff.statement: AC coverage mapped; unit/integration/doc contract tests verified.
